top_tweets.author: thefinnmckenty
top_tweets.name: Finn McKenty
top_tweets.summary_zh: 20年資深產品設計師揭示AI並非捷徑，而是加深設計複雜度的工具，尤其在涉及多地供應鏈的大型品牌專案中更是如此。

top_tweets.text:
Holy shit...Google just quietly changed UI design forever.

They introduced design.md
And it makes AI-generated apps look actually… designed.

No Figma.
No design system docs.
No CSS tweaking for hours.

Just one plain text file.

You literally describe your UI in English:

top_tweets.text:
5 signs your SaaS design is costing you money:

1. Users need a demo to understand the product
2. Support keeps answering questions your UI should
3. People sign up and never come back
4. Investors ask what does this actually do?
5. You're embarrassed to share the link

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
